title: nmap
html:
nmap

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

nmap -iL /path/to/input-file

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

nmap -oG=/path/to/output-file DATA

Inherit

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo '...' >/path/to/temp-file
nmap --script=/path/to/temp-file

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

nmap --interactive
!/bin/sh
excerpt: nmap File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged nmap -iL /path/to/input-file File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged nmap -oG=/path/to/output-file DATA Inherit Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged
